description.value:
A wide-bladed sword designed for powerful cutting and thrusting attacks. Effective in one hand, the broadsword rewards aggressive fighters who press their advantage.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Melee d6, Slashing
BasicOne-Handed, Melee 2d4, Keen, Punch
MasterOne-Handed, Melee 2d4, Keen, Punch â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkWhen you score a critical hit or reduce a target to 0 HP, you may make an extra attack against a different creature within 5 ft. This can repeat if that attack also crits or reduces to 0 HP.
